user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate 3-phase PWM motor control to new AURIX target
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase center-aligned 20 kHz PWM on eGTM Cluster 1 ATOM1 channels 0/1/2 with complementary outputs and 1.0 µs rising/falling dead-time using hardware DTM, initial duties U=25%, V=50%, W=75%, syncStart and syncUpdate enabled, CMU FXCLK0 as ATOM clock, and one period interrupt on channel 0 (CPU0, prio 20). Pin mappings use available ATOM1 TOUTs on KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use unified IfxEgtm_Pwm driver on TC4D7 (TC4xx family). Configure EGTM1.ATOM1 ch 0/1/2 as one base + two sync channels, center-aligned, with complementary outputs and DTM-based dead-time. Select CMU FXCLK0 for ATOM, map ATOM1 TOUT pins via IfxEgtm_PinMap, perform synced start/update via IfxEgtm_Pwm_startSyncedChannels and IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDuty, set initial 1.0 µs dead-time via IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDeadTime, and install a period ISR on channel 0 using IfxCpu_Irq_installInterruptHandler and EGTM SRC configuration.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified PWM API for eGTM on TC4xx; supports ATOM, center-aligned PWM, synchronized groups, complementary outputs with DTM dead-time, and runtime duty/dead-time updates — exactly matching the migration goals.

runtime_function.name: updateEgtmAtom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Synchronous runtime duty update for U/V/W phases while PWM is running.

api_changes.reason: Use synchronized update path for syncUpdate requirement

migration_notes.context_preserved: The migration preserves the original goal by replacing TOM/GTM with ATOM/eGTM using the unified IfxEgtm_Pwm API on TC4D7. Center-aligned 20 kHz PWM, complementary outputs, synchronized start/update, FXCLK0 clock source, initial duties (U=25%, V=50%, W=75%), and a period interrupt on ATOM1 ch0 are all mapped to template-available APIs. Conflicting dead-time statements were resolved to 1.0 µs rising/falling to honor the original requirement and timing_requirements. ATOM1 TOUT pin selections are assigned via IfxEgtm_PinMap and must be validated against KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE and TC4D7 package constraints. Period ISR setup uses IfxCpu_Irq_installInterruptHandler and SRC register configuration; the handler can call IfxEgtm_Pwm_interruptHandler and clear ATOM notifications using available low-level APIs.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
